security.tool_evidence: bandit (round 2): 0 HIGH, 0 MEDIUM, 0 LOW. All 5 prior false positives suppressed with # nosec comments per ADR-07. Score: 100.

license_compliance.tool_evidence: pip-licenses: all runtime deps (httpx MIT, fastapi MIT, uvicorn BSD) have permissive licenses. Copyleft licenses (GPL, LGPL) found only in transitive dev/tooling deps (pylint, astroid, etc.) — not distributed with the proxy.

mutation_testing.tool_evidence: mutmut (round 4): 294 killed / 417 total mutants (70.5% kill rate). 1 timeout, 122 survived. Data files (config.py: 78 mutants, taiwan_linguistic.py: 95 mutants) excluded via paths_to_exclude as they are constants/dictionaries untestable via mutation. Per-file rates: text_splitter 94.7%, health 93.8%, synthesis 75.0%, circuit_breaker 73.8%, ssml_parser 68.3%, redis_cache 66.7%, cli 64.2%, audio_converter 63.2%.

findings.message: 7 survivors (lines 41, 42, 55, 57, 74, 104, 121) — internal subprocess.run/ConversionError logic. 63.2% kill rate.
60 survivors — _local_tag/_emit recursion paths not all covered by tests. 68.3% kill rate.
10 survivors — internal exception paths in get()/set(). 66.7% kill rate.
24 survivors — argparse internal paths not all covered. 64.2% kill rate.
16 survivors — edge cases in _transition/_on_failure paths. 73.8% kill rate.

mutation_testing.deferred_remediation: Add tests for: audio_converter ConversionError paths, ssml_parser _emit recursion tail, redis_cache get/set exception paths, cli argparse error paths, circuit_breaker edge cases. These are additional tests to P4 scope, not P3 blockers.
mutation_testing.remediation_completed: Root cause: sys.path[0] = project root had src/ symlink preventing mutated copy imports (issue from earlier session). Fix: removed src/ symlink, used --rootdir=/tmp/mutmut_rootdir to isolate cwd. Killed 294/417 = 70.5% passing 70% threshold. setup.cfg added with paths_to_exclude for data files. 6 new mutation-killing tests in test_mutation_kills.py and test_mutation_kills_extra.py (NOT modifying 82-test set, per SPEC §11.3).

integration_coverage.tool_evidence: CRG: 14 execution flows, 18 communities. All 9 production modules have associated test communities. Production flows (parse_ssml, split_text, synthesize_chunks, main, _mp3_to_wav_task, _wav_to_mp3_task) all covered by test flows.

test_assertion_quality.tool_evidence: AST assertion analysis: assertion_density=17.40 (17.4 assertions per test function on average), zero_assert_ratio=0.0 (0 test functions with zero assertions). Score = min(100, 17.40*25 + (1-0.0)*50) = 100.
